Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product pages, promotions, and brake part details to source fresh marketing content.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email reflects live inventory and active deals, keeping messaging accurate and relevant without manual content gathering.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a compelling daily marketing email using scraped R1 product data, crafting subject lines, body copy, and calls to action.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces professional, on-brand email copy daily with zero copywriter hours, enabling consistent audience engagement at scale.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Receives the AI-generated email content via Marketing Email API and sends it to the targeted R1 Concepts contact lists.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers personalized marketing emails to segmented audiences automatically, driving traffic and conversions without manual campaign setup.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes DFC product pages, friction product lines, and current promotions to source daily email content.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Keeps email content grounded in real product data, eliminating manual research and ensuring accuracy across DFC's catalog.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a daily marketing email tailored to DFC's brand voice using the scraped product and promotional data.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers consistent, high-quality email copy every day without copywriter involvement, scaling DFC's outreach effortlessly.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Sends the AI-generated DFC marketing email to contact lists via the HubSpot Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates daily campaign delivery to DFC's audience, maintaining engagement and driving product awareness without manual sends.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls newly created or updated support tickets from HubSpot, extracting customer issue details, ticket category, and contact history.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes all incoming support requests for automated processing, eliminating the need for agents to manually triage inboxes.

R1 Support Agent.action: Retrieves relevant product information, fitment guides, and technical specs from the DFC website to inform support replies.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Grounds AI responses in accurate product data, reducing incorrect answers and improving first-contact resolution rates.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies the support ticket by issue type and drafts a personalized, accurate reply for the R1 Concepts support team to review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Cuts ticket response drafting time dramatically, allowing support agents to handle higher volumes while maintaining response quality.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls form submissions from Amazon in-box flyer return and issue forms stored as HubSpot contacts or form entries.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Aggregates all customer-reported issues from Amazon purchases into one automated pipeline, replacing manual inbox monitoring.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the pulled HubSpot form data into a structured Google Sheet, appending new rows and organizing issues by type and date.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives the team a live, sortable view of return trends and product issues, enabling faster quality control decisions and supplier feedback.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot contact and activity records to detect when DFC customers visit or engage with the R1 Concepts website.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Surfaces buying signals in real time, allowing the sales team to reach out to warm prospects at the exact moment of interest.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends a real-time alert card via Power Automate to the sales team's Teams channel and email with the customer's activity details.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Eliminates lag between customer activity and sales follow-up, increasing the likelihood of converting engaged accounts.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Agent is currently in development; final integrations and workflow steps are not yet defined.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Expected to automate customer-facing interactions for R1 Concepts, reducing support load and improving response times.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Scrapes local business directories, listings, and web sources to find businesses in the Cerritos area likely needing warehouse or office space, then discovers their contact emails.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Builds a fresh list of qualified local prospects daily without any manual research, keeping the outreach pipeline full automatically.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Creates or updates contact records in HubSpot for each discovered business lead, tagging them for the Cerritos sublet campaign.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Organizes all outreach targets in one place with full tracking, preventing duplicate outreach and enabling follow-up workflows.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Sends a personalized warm introduction email to each new lead highlighting the 13140 Midway Place Cerritos sublet opportunity.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Drives daily outreach to relevant local businesses on autopilot, accelerating the timeline to find a subtenant without a broker.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Pulls campaign performance data across R1 and DFC Amazon ad accounts including spend, impressions, clicks, and ACOS metrics.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Consolidates cross-brand ad performance into one automated feed, eliminating manual report downloads from Seller Central.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Analyzes campaign performance data to identify underperforming keywords, budget inefficiencies, and optimization opportunities across both brands.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Delivers actionable ad optimization recommendations at a fraction of the time of manual analysis, improving ad efficiency and reducing wasted spend.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube, Instagram, and the web using target keywords to surface relevant content creators and their profile data.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Replaces hours of manual creator hunting with an automated multi-platform sweep, expanding the discovery pool instantly.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes discovered creator profiles to assess relevance, audience fit, and content alignment with the brand's target keywords.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Filters raw discovery results into a curated shortlist of relevant creators, saving significant manual review time.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighting criteria such as engagement rate, audience size, niche relevance, and content quality.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Produces a ranked, objective creator shortlist in seconds, enabling faster partnership decisions and reducing bias in creator selection.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves qualified creator profiles, outreach sequences, and prompt templates stored in Drive to inform the AI's messaging strategy.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures every outreach message is grounded in pre-approved brand voice and tested sequences, eliminating manual template lookup.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each creator by applying learned sequences and prompts against the creator's profile data.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, high-converting outreach at scale without requiring a human copywriter for each individual message.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails directly to qualified creators from the designated brand inbox.
Creator Outreach.impact: Delivers personalized outreach to hundreds of creators simultaneously, compressing days of manual sending into minutes.

Creator Reponse.action: Retrieves historical influencer email conversations and negotiation outcomes to train the AI on successful response patterns.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds AI responses in real negotiation history, improving deal close rates by mimicking what has worked before.

Creator Reponse.action: Reads incoming creator replies from the inbox and surfaces them to the AI for context-aware response generation.
Creator Reponse.impact: Eliminates manual inbox monitoring and ensures no creator reply goes unaddressed, keeping deal momentum alive.

Creator Reponse.action: Analyzes the creator's reply alongside historical negotiation data and generates a contextually appropriate follow-up or counter-offer response.
Creator Reponse.impact: Handles complex back-and-forth negotiations autonomously, freeing the partnerships team from routine reply management.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Pulls MHM vehicle data and cross-references it against the New Availability Guide to identify matching part numbers and build the load sheet.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Automates a tedious weekly matching process that previously required manual lookup, reducing load sheet prep from hours to seconds.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Sends an internal notification to the marketing team confirming the load sheet has been generated and the HubSpot email is ready for review.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Keeps the team informed without requiring manual status updates, ensuring the Monday deadline is never missed.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Creates and sends the Must Have Monday email in HubSpot, attaching the generated sales sheet and load sheet to the appropriate contact list.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Delivers a fully formatted, on-brand weekly email to the dealer network without any manual HubSpot setup or list management.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates compelling First to Market email copy and monthly recap email narratives based on new product launch data and brand guidelines.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces launch-ready email drafts instantly, allowing the marketing team to focus on strategy rather than copywriting.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates email drafts in HubSpot with the AI-generated copy, attaches the sales sheet, and stages the email for the appropriate product launch send list.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Eliminates manual email building in HubSpot, ensuring every new product launch has a ready-to-send email within minutes of product data entry.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Extracts lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth data, and email performance statistics for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Pulls accurate CRM metrics in seconds, replacing manual data export and copy-paste workflows that previously took hours.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Retrieves SMS campaign performance data including send volume, click-through rates, and revenue attribution for the month.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Consolidates SMS performance into the deck automatically, giving leadership a complete channel view without manual reporting.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls web traffic, session data, conversion events, and channel attribution metrics for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Automates the most time-consuming part of deck prep by sourcing GA4 data directly without manual report exports.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Populates slides 48–55 of the Marketing Highlights deck by inserting the collected metrics, charts, and performance summaries into pre-built slide templates.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Delivers a fully populated, boardroom-ready deck section in minutes instead of the several hours of manual slide building it replaces.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Identifies keyword ranking gaps between R1 Concepts and competitors by analyzing current impressions, clicks, and position data.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Pinpoints high-opportunity keywords that competitors rank for but R1 does not, ensuring every blog targets traffic-generating topics.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Generates SEO-optimized blog articles targeting the identified keyword gaps, structured with proper headers, meta descriptions, and on-page SEO best practices.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publication-ready SEO content at scale, enabling R1 Concepts to close keyword gaps faster than manual content production would allow.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the generated blog posts to the R1 Concepts WordPress site with Yoast SEO fields populated including focus keyword, meta title, and readability settings.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Eliminates manual publishing and SEO field entry, ensuring every post goes live fully optimized and indexed-ready without editor intervention.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Exports open vendor purchase order data including PO numbers, due dates, vendor contacts, and outstanding quantities for processing.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Eliminates manual ERP report generation and data extraction, ensuring the most current PO data is always used for vendor follow-up.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Transforms and uploads the processed PO data into HubSpot, creating or updating vendor contact records and enrolling them in automated chase email sequences.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Turns raw ERP exports into actionable vendor follow-up campaigns automatically, reducing time spent on manual vendor chase communication to near zero.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts MHM vehicle part number inputs and matches them against an embedded New Availability Guide lookup table directly in the browser.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Gives the sales team an instant, no-login tool to generate load sheets on demand without waiting on IT systems or API dependencies.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Formats the matched data into a structured DFC load sheet layout and exports it as a downloadable Excel file.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Produces a formatted, submission-ready load sheet in seconds, eliminating manual spreadsheet formatting and reducing errors in dealer submissions.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Navigates the Attentive web UI via Chrome browser automation to locate the most recent MHM SMS campaign and clone it as the new week's template.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Bypasses the lack of an Attentive API to fully automate campaign creation, saving 20–30 minutes of manual weekly setup.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Updates the cloned campaign with the current week's MHM vehicle name in the message body and sets the correct scheduled send time before saving.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Ensures every weekly SMS goes out with accurate vehicle details and on-time delivery without any manual editing in the Attentive interface.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports DFC customer sales transaction data including order history, purchase frequency, product categories, and revenue by account.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Provides a complete, current view of customer buying behavior that powers all downstream segmentation and campaign logic.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Segments customers into reorder, cross-sell, and win-back cohorts based on the sales data analysis and enrolls each segment in the appropriate automated email sequence.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Activates targeted revenue-recovery and upsell campaigns automatically, replacing manual list-building and one-size-fits-all email blasts.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Sends targeted SMS messages to high-value DFC customer segments identified in the sales analysis, including reorder nudges and promotional offers.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Adds a high-open-rate SMS touchpoint to the campaign mix, increasing overall campaign response rates and recovered revenue from lapsed buyers.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors William Nguyen's Teams channel for a newly uploaded Excel file each week containing the Super Session Saturday download asset.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Eliminates manual file-checking and ensures the automation triggers the moment new content is ready, keeping the Saturday 8AM send on schedule without human intervention.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Uploads the new Excel file to HubSpot File Manager and generates a fresh public download URL to replace the previous week's link.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Ensures every email contains a live, version-correct download link without manually managing file hosting or link updates.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Clones the previous week's Super Session Saturday email, swaps in the new download URL, and schedules the send for Saturday at 8AM.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Delivers a consistent, on-brand weekly email to the full list every Saturday without any copywriting or scheduling effort from the team.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates fully structured B2B SEO blog posts targeting DFC's core audiences — shops, distributors, and fleets — using keyword briefs and brand guidelines.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publish-ready, search-optimized content at scale without requiring a copywriter, consistently expanding DFC's organic search footprint.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Receives the AI-generated blog content and publishes it with proper SEO metadata, categories, and formatting applied.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Keeps the DFC blog consistently updated with indexed, rankable content that drives qualified organic traffic from shops, distributors, and fleet buyers.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday video references, pulls vehicle images from Bing Images and Wikimedia Commons, and fetches spec/history content from Wikipedia for the given year/make/model.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual research and asset hunting by automatically sourcing all raw content needed to build the video package before a single word is written.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Receives the scraped vehicle data, specs, and reference context and generates a fully structured Friction Friday video script formatted for voiceover delivery.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Produces a broadcast-ready, on-brand script in seconds, removing the need for a copywriter and ensuring consistent episode tone and structure across every vehicle.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Converts the Claude-generated script into a professional voiceover audio file using a configured AI voice persona.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Delivers a studio-quality narration track instantly, cutting voiceover recording and editing time entirely from the production workflow.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Receives the completed script, voiceover file reference, thumbnail asset, and assembled video details via Apps Script webhook and logs the full package as a new row in the production tracker sheet.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Gives the team a single organized record of every completed video package with all assets linked, so publishing requires no hunting across folders or tools.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Pulls all active R1 Concepts HubSpot workflows and audits enrollment triggers, logic branches, delays, and email sequences for gaps or inefficiencies.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Identifies broken enrollment triggers and underperforming sequences so R1's welcome series and site visit automations convert more leads without added ad spend.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Applies recommended fixes to site visit triggers, re-structures welcome series email timing, and updates contact segmentation criteria.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Delivers a cleaner, higher-converting automation stack that properly nurtures new visitors and leads through the R1 funnel from first touch to purchase consideration.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Extracts all Dream CustomerIDs along with associated contact details, purchase history, and account attributes needed for sales automation matching.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Creates a clean, structured data export that makes it possible to link real purchasing customers to their HubSpot contact records for targeted automation.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Maps each Dream CustomerID to the corresponding HubSpot contact record, writing the CustomerID as a custom property to enable sales workflow enrollment.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Bridges the ERP and CRM so DFC's sales automation workflows can target real customers with purchase-aware messaging, personalizing outreach at scale.

Bomb File Project.action: Project is currently in planning stage with connections and workflow steps not yet defined.
Bomb File Project.impact: Scoping this project now ensures the right integrations are identified before build begins, reducing rework and accelerating deployment once greenlit.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Detects each new R1 Concepts YouTube video and extracts the title, description, transcript, and thumbnail to drive all downstream content creation.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Ensures every R1 video publish automatically triggers a full multi-channel content cycle with zero manual kickoff required.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Publishes a formatted SEO blog post derived from the video content, embedding the YouTube video and optimizing metadata for search.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Extends R1's content reach into organic search, capturing buyers researching brake and performance parts who prefer written content over video.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Generates and sends a weekly branded email to R1's contact list featuring the new video, blog post link, and product tie-ins.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Keeps R1's audience engaged with a consistent weekly touchpoint that drives traffic to both YouTube and the website, supporting retargeting and conversion.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Sends a concise SMS to R1's subscriber list linking directly to the new video or blog post for immediate mobile engagement.
R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Delivers near-instant awareness to R1's most engaged customers via mobile, capturing attention in a channel with significantly higher open rates than email.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly keyword rankings, impressions, clicks, and position data for all DFC blog URLs to measure organic search performance.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Gives the team clear visibility into which blog posts are gaining search traction, enabling faster decisions on which topics to scale or refresh.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves traffic sessions, engagement rates, time-on-page, and conversion events for DFC blog content to measure business impact.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Connects organic traffic to actual on-site behavior and conversions, proving the ROI of the blog agent beyond just rankings.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Provides publish cadence data including post count, publish dates, and Yoast SEO scores to measure agent efficiency and content quality.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Tracks how consistently and effectively the blog agent is producing content, making it easy to report output quality alongside traffic results.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls monthly keyword rankings, impressions, and click data for all R1 Concepts blog posts to track SEO growth over time.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Provides month-over-month ranking progression data that demonstrates the compounding value of the blog agent to R1 stakeholders.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves monthly blog traffic, audience engagement metrics, and goal completions to quantify business impact from content.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Ties content performance directly to site behavior and revenue signals, giving R1 a clear monthly picture of blog-driven business value.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Exports monthly post volume, publish schedule adherence, and content metadata to report on agent output consistency.
R1 Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Confirms the agent is delivering at expected cadence and quality, making monthly reporting to stakeholders fast and data-backed.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Monitors the Outlook inbox for incoming vendor PO invoice PDFs and extracts the attachments to pass into the processing pipeline.
PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Eliminates manual email triage and attachment downloading, capturing every invoice automatically as it arrives without human monitoring.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Processes each invoice PDF by applying the Harbor Tires stamp image and Richard's signature to the correct page and position using PDF manipulation logic.
PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Completes in seconds what would take minutes per invoice manually, removing a repetitive bottleneck from the AP approval process.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Renders the final stamped and signed PDF with full fidelity, ensuring the output meets vendor and audit requirements for an approved PO invoice.
PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.impact: Produces a professional, legally sufficient stamped document every time, reducing errors and ensuring compliance without manual review of each file.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Tracks prospect visits to specific DFC pages and feeds page-level behavioral data into the workflow trigger system.
DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.impact: Identifies high-intent prospects at the exact moment of interest, enabling timely outreach that dramatically increases conversion likelihood.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Matches the page visit event to a contact record, triggers one of 6 Phase 1 workflow branches, and sends a contextually relevant automated email based on which DFC page was visited.
DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.impact: Delivers personalized follow-up emails at scale without manual sales effort, ensuring every prospect receives relevant content tied to exactly what they were browsing.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Captures incoming customer support requests from available channels and queues them for AI processing.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Centralizes all incoming support volume into a single automated pipeline, eliminating manual ticket sorting and reducing first-response time.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Classifies the ticket by issue type, determines urgency, drafts a resolution response, and flags tickets requiring human escalation.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Resolves common support issues instantly without agent involvement, freeing the support team to focus only on complex cases that genuinely require human judgment.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Updates the ticket record with AI classification, posts the drafted response to the customer, and routes escalated tickets to the appropriate human agent queue.
R1 AI Ticketing Automation.impact: Ensures every ticket receives a documented, consistent response with full audit trail, reducing average handle time and improving customer satisfaction scores.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Receives the monthly new arrivals file from Gerrit Young and triggers the downstream automation pipeline to begin processing.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Eliminates manual handoff coordination and ensures the NAG campaign launches on a consistent monthly cadence without project management overhead.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Ingests the new arrivals file and updates the product catalog with new part listings, descriptions, and availability status.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Keeps the live product backend in sync with marketing communications so customers clicking through from the NAG land on accurate, purchasable product pages.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Clones the standard NAG email template, populates it with the new arrivals content, and schedules the broadcast to the DFC subscriber list.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Produces a fully personalized monthly email campaign in minutes rather than hours, maintaining brand consistency while showcasing the latest inventory.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Clones the NAG SMS template, inserts new arrival highlights and a short link, and queues the message for the DFC SMS subscriber list.
DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).impact: Reaches mobile-first customers on a high-open-rate channel simultaneously with email, maximizing new arrival visibility and driving incremental traffic.

Don Carrier Outreach.action: Identifies prospective shipping carriers from the contact database, enrolls them in the outreach sequence, and sends templated RFQ emails requesting cost and lead time quotes.
Don Carrier Outreach.impact: Automates the entire carrier prospecting process so the logistics team receives qualified quotes without spending hours on manual outreach and follow-up.

Don Carrier Outreach.action: Parses incoming carrier quote responses, compares submitted cost and lead time against current carrier benchmarks, and automatically marks carriers as qualified or disqualified based on the 5% cost threshold and lead time criteria.
Don Carrier Outreach.impact: Eliminates hours of manual quote comparison and ensures objective, consistent carrier evaluation at scale, surfacing only viable candidates for human review.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls current week performance metrics from all three paid channels via their respective APIs.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Consolidates multi-platform data in seconds, replacing what would otherwise require manual exports from three separate ad dashboards each week.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Compares current week metrics against the prior month's rolling average, identifies notable performance shifts, and drafts a plain-English summary with channel-level callouts.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Transforms raw numbers into actionable insights instantly, allowing the media team to spot budget inefficiencies or breakout performance without manual analysis.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Sends the formatted weekly checkup report to the relevant team members every week on schedule.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Ensures consistent visibility into paid channel health across the team with zero manual effort, keeping stakeholders informed without requiring access to ad platforms.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Exports full-month performance data across all paid channels for the reporting period.
Monthly Report Builder.impact: Aggregates a complete month of cross-platform data in one pull, eliminating hours of manual data collection at end of month.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Structures the monthly data into a slide-ready narrative with channel performance breakdowns, month-over-month comparisons, and key takeaways formatted for executive presentation.
Monthly Report Builder.impact: Cuts end-of-month reporting preparation from several hours to minutes, delivering a polished, presentation-ready summary that's consistent in format every month.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Delivers the completed monthly report to stakeholders formatted and ready for insertion into the end-of-month slide deck.
Monthly Report Builder.impact: Gives leadership timely, professionally structured reporting without burdening the media team with manual deck-building at month end.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Detects when a contact completes the Amazon flyer warranty registration and tags them with a qualifying audience segment property.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Creates a real-time, high-intent audience segment from warranty registrants who have already demonstrated brand commitment, without any manual list building.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Validates and normalizes contact data to ensure records are complete, deduped, and properly formatted before being pushed to Meta.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Maximizes audience match rates on Meta by ensuring only clean, well-formatted data is synced, improving retargeting reach and reducing wasted ad spend.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Adds validated contacts to a Custom Audience, making them immediately targetable with paid social campaigns.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Enables precise retargeting of proven buyers at scale, turning warranty registrants into a warm paid social audience that converts at significantly higher rates than cold traffic.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Pulls active ad creative data including copy, performance metrics, and spend levels across both paid social platforms.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Captures a complete snapshot of live ad copy performance in one automated pull, removing the need for manual account reviews across multiple platforms.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Evaluates each ad's copy against its performance benchmarks, identifies underperforming creative, diagnoses likely copy weaknesses, and generates specific rewrite recommendations.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Delivers expert-level copy analysis at scale across every active ad, surfacing improvement opportunities that would take a copywriter days to manually identify and document.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Sends the audit report with flagged ads and copy recommendations to the paid social team for review and implementation.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Puts actionable creative improvements directly in the team's inbox on a regular cadence, creating a feedback loop that continuously raises ad copy quality over time.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors project and task data across Asana workspaces, pulling current task statuses, deadlines, assignments, and blockers.
Asana Agent.impact: Provides a real-time structured view of project health without requiring team members to manually compile status updates.

Asana Agent.action: Analyzes task and project data to identify overdue items, bottlenecks, and priority actions, then drafts a concise summary with recommended next steps.
Asana Agent.impact: Translates raw project data into a prioritized action plan, saving managers significant time on status synthesis and ensuring nothing critical falls through the cracks.

Asana Agent.action: Delivers the Asana project summary and recommended actions to the relevant stakeholders via email.
Asana Agent.impact: Keeps decision-makers informed on project status without requiring them to log into Asana, reducing management overhead and accelerating issue resolution.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Captures the transcript or notes from the weekly media meeting as the raw input for task extraction.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Preserves a complete record of every commitment and discussion point made during the meeting, ensuring nothing discussed verbally is lost or forgotten.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Forwards the meeting content or summary to the processing pipeline, serving as the handoff point between Teams and the AI.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Creates a clean, accessible input format for AI processing and provides an automatic email record of meeting outputs for participants.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Parses the meeting notes to extract discrete tasks, identifies owners and deadlines from context, and structures each item into an Asana-ready task format.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Eliminates manual task transcription after every meeting, turning a 45-minute media meeting into a fully populated Asana task list in seconds with consistent formatting.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Creates new tasks in the appropriate Asana projects with assigned owners, due dates, and descriptions populated from the AI-extracted meeting output.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Ensures every commitment made in the weekly media meeting is immediately tracked and assigned in the team's project management system, improving accountability and follow-through.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Pulls all active search ads flagged as underperforming, exporting the ad copy, performance metrics, and campaign/ad group context for each.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Surfaces the exact ads dragging down campaign performance, so the audit focuses only on what needs fixing rather than requiring a manual review of every ad in the account.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Analyzes each underperforming ad's copy against performance data and generates specific, actionable rewrite recommendations with reasoning for each suggested change.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Turns raw performance data into a prioritized copy improvement plan, replacing the need for a strategist to manually diagnose and rewrite each ad individually.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Sends a formatted audit report email containing the flagged ads, their performance issues, and Claude's rewrite recommendations to the appropriate team member or manager.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Delivers a ready-to-act improvement brief directly to the decision-maker's inbox, cutting the time from data pull to actionable recommendations from hours to minutes.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Reads the current state of the Agent Tracker sheet, pulling all agent records, statuses, updates, and metadata added during the week.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Captures a complete, structured snapshot of every agent's weekly progress without requiring anyone to manually compile or copy data into a report format.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Takes the raw sheet data and reformats it into a clean, human-readable weekly summary with clear sections, highlights, and consistent formatting.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Transforms a dense spreadsheet into a polished, scannable update that communicates progress clearly to stakeholders without anyone spending time writing or formatting a report.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Sends the formatted weekly agent tracker update to the relevant team members or leadership as a recurring email digest.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Ensures the whole team stays aligned on agent progress each week with zero manual effort, replacing what would otherwise require someone to write and distribute the update by hand.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle spec via HubSpot form, which triggers a lookup against the internal DFC catalog (Dream) to retrieve all parts associated with that make, model, and year.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Instantly connects a simple form submission to a full catalog query, eliminating the need for Mark or anyone else to manually search the catalog line by line for matching parts.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Processes the catalog results and structures them into a formatted output that clearly distinguishes what DFC stocks for the vehicle versus what is missing from inventory.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Produces a clean, organized comparison that makes gaps in coverage immediately obvious, saving Mark the manual work of cross-referencing what exists against what should be there.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark the completed formatted Excel catalog file showing DFC stock coverage and inventory gaps for the submitted vehicle spec.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers a finished, ready-to-use catalog file directly to Mark's inbox minutes after form submission, replacing what would have been hours of manual lookup and spreadsheet building.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, returning on-hand quantity, on-order quantity, in-transit status, and whether any supply source exists.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent manual lookups by centralizing all inventory enrichment into a single automated pull, cutting hours of duplicated effort down to seconds.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Merges the live Dream inventory data into the existing backorder report, flags parts with no supply source as dead-ends, and highlights critical status changes for customer-impacting lines.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Produces an enriched, decision-ready report with all status data in one place, so the team can immediately see what can be resolved and what needs escalation.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for backorder updates, using the enriched report data to personalize each message with accurate status and estimated resolution.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Eliminates manual drafting of individual customer emails, ensuring every affected customer gets a timely, accurate update without anyone writing a single email by hand.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor fitments by make, model, and year.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitive fitment reference automatically, replacing what would require hours of manual catalog browsing across three separate vendor websites.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped fitment data against DFC's existing parts catalog and compiles the matched and unmatched results into a structured reference sheet formatted for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals where DFC has coverage and where market gaps exist, giving Dino a prioritized opportunity map without any manual comparison work.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to relevant customers to gather demand data on two-piece rotor fitments where DFC has no current coverage.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Generates real demand signals from actual customers to inform stocking decisions, replacing guesswork with data and doing so at scale without manual outreach effort.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad creatives and copy fields, extracting every headline, body text, and description currently running across campaigns.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides a complete, real-time export of live ad copy without requiring anyone to manually open and read through each ad in the platform's interface.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all collected ad copy for the specified target phrases and flags every match, noting the exact ad, field, and verbatim copy where each phrase appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Catches every instance of flagged language across potentially hundreds of active ads in seconds, eliminating the risk of missing a match during a manual review.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a formatted report email listing every flagged ad with the exact field and copy text where each target phrase was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a precise, actionable compliance or quality report directly to the requester's inbox on demand, turning a tedious manual audit into a one-click investigation.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, extracts the resume attachment and applicant details from each email.
Resume Bot.impact: Ensures every application is captured and processed immediately upon arrival, eliminating the risk of submissions being missed or sitting unreviewed in a shared inbox.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each extracted resume PDF to a structured folder in Drive, organized by role and applicant name for easy retrieval.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a permanent, organized archive of all applications without manual filing, so the hiring team can always find any resume instantly regardless of email volume.

Resume Bot.action: Reads each resume against the requirements of open roles and produces a score and brief reasoning, then routes the applicant into one of three categories: approved for review, denied, or pending due to a paused role.
Resume Bot.impact: Reduces hours of initial resume screening to seconds per candidate, ensuring consistent evaluation criteria and freeing the hiring team to focus only on qualified, role-matched applicants.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant's details, score, decision, and Drive file link to the hiring dashboard, with denied and approved candidates in the main tab and paused-role candidates in a dedicated Pending tab.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives the hiring team a live, organized view of the entire applicant pipeline with zero manual data entry, and ensures paused-role candidates are never lost or forgotten.

summary: Our AI automation pipeline continues to grow, now standing at **56 total agents** — **28 Completed, 10 In Progress, and 18 Planned**. This week we welcomed one new addition: the **Resume Bot**, which automates the full candidate intake process by reading incoming resumes from jobs@r1concepts.com, scoring applicants against open roles using Claude, filing PDFs in Drive, sending auto-replies, and logging everything to a Sheets dashboard. No agents changed stages this week, but the pipeline remains active and momentum is strong across all workstreams. Great work to everyone contributing to the build-out — we're continuing to expand what automation can do across the business!
